description: Composition White shorts made of 100% polyester, has a broad elasticated waistband and adidas 3-Stripe running down the sides. Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash or use fabric softener Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo Progressive casual wear meets sporty style in these shorts from adidas. This piece nails the minimalistic mood that is currently trending. Work this Sports/casual aesthetic with a monochrome tee and sport shoes. For a more casual vibe, style this with a T-shirt, jacket and casual shoes. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
